sections.paragraph: <entryFree id="n65416" key="megalokamph/s" type="main" opt="n" TEIform="entryFree"> <orth extent="full" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">μεγᾰλο-καμπής</orth>, <itype lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="itype">ές</itype>, <sense id="n65416.0" n="A" level="1" opt="n" TEIform="sense"> <tr_ opt="n" TEIform="tr">with a large curve</tr_>, <bibl n="urn:cts:greekLit:tlg0722.tlg001:45:6:6" default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <author TEIform="author">Orib.</author> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">45.6.6</biblScope></bibl>.</sense> </entryFree>
